response:
Yes we can check how long it took for udp packet to be sent to server like ping but only one direction

To do this we can use the System.Net.Sockets.UdpClient class

We can create a UdpClient instance and send a packet to the server

We can measure the time taken to send the packet using the System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch class

We can then compare the time taken to send the packet with the time taken to receive the packet

This way we can get the one direction timing

We can also use the NetworkInterface.GetIsNetworkAvailable method to check if the network is available

We can also use the NetworkInterface.GetIPAddresses method to get the local IP address

We can also use the NetworkInformation.GetIPv4Address method to get the IPv4 address

We can also use the NetworkInformation.GetIPv6Address method to get the IPv6 address
